title: Trigonospora ciliata
taxonomy: Trigonospora ciliata is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The classification of Trigonospora ciliata places it within the genus Trigonospora, and further categorizes it as a member of the order Malpighiales. This order is part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as angiosperms. The exact classification of Trigonospora ciliata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.

Its leaves are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating skin conditions and wounds.
